popularStory.headline: Career
popularStory.description: John Arundell was knighted in 1399 at the coronation of Henry IV of England. In February 1405, as ‘King’s knight’, Arundell was appointed as Captain of Marck, one of the Calais outposts, this included …

zh.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英國英格蘭可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir John Arundell VI於大約1370年出生在英國可瓦爾藍黑爾時，他的父親Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne35歲，母親Joan Luscote27歲。他於1390年與Anora Lambourne在英國英格蘭可瓦爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1406年登記服兵役。他去世於1435年1月11日在英國可瓦爾享年66歲，埋葬在英國可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

zh-hans.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 英国可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir John Arundell VI于大约1370年出生在英国可瓦爾藍黑爾时，他的父亲Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne35岁，母亲Joan Luscote27岁。他于1390年与Anora Lambourne在英国英格兰可瓦爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他于1406年登记服兵役。他去世于1435年1月11日在英国可瓦爾享年66岁，埋葬在英国可瓦爾聖 可倫布 梅傑。

nameMeanings.name: Arundell
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Arundel
meanings: (of Norman origin): nickname from Old French arondel ‘little swallow’ (a diminutive of arond ‘swallow’, from Latin hirundo).

habitational name from a place so named in West Sussex, from Old English hārhūne ‘horehound’ (a wild plant, Marrubium vulgare) + dell ‘valley’. This place is the seat of the dukes of Norfolk. In northern England, folk etymology resulted in variants such as Arendale .

nameMeanings.name: John
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir John Arundell VI was born about 1370, in Lanherne, Cornwall, England, his father, Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne, was 35 and his mother, Joan Luscote, was 27. He married Anora Lambourne in 1390, in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1406. He died on 11 January 1435, in Cornwall, England, at the age of 66, and was buried in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England.

fr.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir John Arundell VI est né environ 1370, à Lanherne, Cornouailles, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne, avait 35 ans et sa mère, Joan Luscote, avait 27 ans. Il a épousé Anora Lambourne en 1390, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1406. Il est décédé le 11 janvier 1435, à Cornouailles, Angleterre, à l’âge de 66 ans, et a été enterré à St Columb Major, Cornouailles, Angleterre.

de.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornwall, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir John Arundell VI um 1370 in Lanherne, Cornwall, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne 35 und seine Mutter Joan Luscote 27. Er hat 1390 in Cornwall, England, United Kingdom Anora Lambourne geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1406 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. Er starb am 11. Januar 1435 im Alter von 66 Jahren in Cornwall, England und wurde in St Columb Major, Cornwall, England begraben.

it.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito
it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell VI è nato il circa 1370 nel Lanherne, Cornwall, England, il suo padre, Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Joan Luscote, aveva 27 anni. Lui sposato Anora Lambourne nel 1390, nel Cornwall, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1406. Morì il 11 gennaio 1435, nel Cornwall, England, all'età di 66 anni, e fu sepolto a St Columb Major, Cornwall, England.

ja.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: イギリスイギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャー
ja.St Columb Major, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャー
ja.Lanherne, Cornwall, England: イギリスコルンワルランハーン
ja.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VIが約1370年にイギリスコルンワルランハーンで生まれた時，父Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherneは35歳，母Joan Luscoteは27歳であった。1390年にイギリスイギリスコルンワルでAnora Lambourneと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1406年に兵役登録をした。彼は1435年1月11日にイギリスコルンワルで66歳で死去し，イギリスコルンワルスト コルンブ マジャーにて埋葬された。

ko.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: 영국 잉글랜드 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르
ko.lifeSummary: Sir John Arundell VI(이)가 대략 1370년 영국 코른월 랜헤른에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Joan Luscote(은)는 27세였다. 그는 1390년 영국 잉글랜드 코른월에서 Anora Lambourne(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1406년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 그는 1435년 1월 11일 영국 코른월에서 66세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 코른월 스트 콜럼 마조르에 묻혔다.

pt.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir John Arundell VI nasceu aproximadamente 1370, em Lanherne, Cornwall, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Joan Luscote, tinha 27 anos. Ele casou-se com Anora Lambourne em 1390, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1406. Ele faleceu em 11 de janeiro de 1435, em Cornwall, Inglaterra, com 66 anos, e foi sepultado em St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra.

ru.St. Columb Major, Cornwall, England: ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir John Arundell VI родился около 1370 г. в местности ланирн, корнвалл, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John Arundell IV of Lanherne было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan Luscote, 27. Он женился на женщине по имени Anora Lambourne в 1390 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1406 году он поступил на военную службу. Он умер 11 января 1435 г. в местности корнвалл, Англия в возрасте 66 лет и был похоронен в местности ст колумб маджор, корнвалл, Англия.

Se casó con Anora Lambourne en 1390, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1406. Murió el 11 de enero de 1435, en Cornwall, Inglaterra, a la edad de 66 años, y fue sepultado en St Columb Major, Cornwall, Inglaterra.
